originalTitle: Donald Trump and Gianni Infantino booed before US president attempts to crash Spain celebrations
summary: Donald Trump and Gianni Infantino were booed as they took to the field for the presentation ceremony of the World Cup final on Sunday
content: Donald Trump and Gianni Infantino were booed as they took to the field for the presentation ceremony before the US president attempted to gatecrash Spain’s victory party. Trump arrived at the stadium on Marine One, with the president’s helicopter first flying over the stadium about 45 minutes before kick-off. He sat in a glassed-in section of luxury seats for the match, along with Infantino. Other dignitaries and former players sat nearby, including Spain’s king, Felipe VI, Canada’s prime minister, Mark Carney, and Mexico’s president, Claudia Sheinbaum. Trump was briefly shown on the video screens at the stadium after the US national anthem was played. There were scattered boos from some in the crowd but nothing like the hostile reception he has received at other sporting events during his presidency. However, when the US president and Infantino came on to the field for the presentation after Spain clinched victory, boos rang out around the stadium. The White House pool report said that ambient crowd noise, which had been sitting at approximately 78 decibels before their introduction, rose to 84 decibels when Trump entered the field. Then, after Trump presented Spain with the World Cup trophy, he attempted to stand with the team at the side of the podium as they celebrated before Infantino quietly ushered him away. It was a repeat of last summer’s Club World Cup at the same stadium after Trump presented the trophy to champions Chelsea and tried to crash the celebrations to the bemusement of the players. Trump has made several appearances at sporting events since his re-election. Last year, he attended the Super Bowl, tennis’s US Open, the Daytona 500 and golf’s Ryder Cup. This year, he has attended several golf events, college football’s national championship game and Game 3 of the NBA finals, where he was met with boos from the New York Knicks home crowd. Trump’s appearance was the first time he has attended a match at this summer’s World Cup, which the have US co-hosted along with Canada and Mexico. At the 2022 World Cup final, the emir of Qatar, Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad al-Thani, joined Infantino to award the trophy to Lionel Messi and his Argentina teammates. Vladimir Putin awarded it to Kylian Mbappé and France after their win at the 2018 World Cup in Russia. Trump is the first sitting US president to attend a World Cup final on home soil. When the US hosted the tournament in 1994, Trump’s predecessor Bill Clinton did not attend the game. The trophy was instead presented by Clinton’s vice-president, Al Gore. Trump has a close relationship with Infantino, and called the Fifa president to lobby for a review of USA star Folarin Balogun’s controversial red-card suspension before their last-16 match. Fifa did reverse Balogun’s ban, but the political circus cast a pall over the US team, who exited a promising World Cup with defeat to Belgium.
chineseTitle: 在美国总统试图破坏西班牙庆祝活动之前，唐纳德·特朗普和詹尼·因凡蒂诺发出嘘声
chineseSummary: 唐纳德·特朗普和詹尼·因凡蒂诺周日走上球场参加世界杯决赛颁奖典礼时遭到嘘声
chineseContent: 唐纳德·特朗普和詹尼·因凡蒂诺在美国总统试图闯入西班牙胜利党之前走上颁奖典礼现场时遭到嘘声。特朗普乘坐海军陆战队一号抵达体育场，总统的直升机在开球前约 45 分钟首次飞越体育场上空。这场比赛他和因凡蒂诺一起坐在豪华座位的玻璃区域。其他政要和前球员坐在附近，包括西班牙国王费利佩六世、加拿大总理马克·卡尼和墨西哥总统克劳迪娅·谢因鲍姆。在美国国歌奏响后，特朗普在体育场的视频屏幕上短暂出现。人群中有人发出零星的嘘声，但与他在担任总统期间在其他体育赛事中受到的敌意接待完全不同。然而，当美国总统和因凡蒂诺在西班牙获胜后上场发表演讲时，体育场周围响起了嘘声。白宫泳池报告称，在引入之前，周围人群的噪音约为 78 分贝，而当特朗普入场时，周围人群的噪音升至 84 分贝。然后，在特朗普向西班牙颁发世界杯奖杯后，他试图与球队一起站在领奖台旁边庆祝，然后因凡蒂诺悄悄地把他送走了。这是去年夏天在同一体育场举行的世俱杯的重演，当时特朗普向冠军切尔西颁发了奖杯，并试图破坏庆祝活动，让球员们感到困惑。自连任以来，特朗普多次出席体育赛事。去年，他参加了超级碗、美国网球公开赛、代托纳 500 大赛和莱德杯高尔夫比赛。今年，他参加了多项高尔夫赛事、大学橄榄球全国锦标赛和G
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
